title: Workdoc - Collaborative Colours
excerpt:

posts.author: jackw (Jack Wallace)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be really helpful to have your own colour option for work docs. This would make collaboration really easy and allow people to see who’s editing what.
People could change their colours and then collaborate based on those colour.
Furthermore maybe you could make teams to have specific colours, this would help with breakout projects.
